title: Citrusy Chewy Saudi Sultana Salad
description: A light, nocook salad that combines tangy citrus, chewy sultanas, and fresh vegetables for a sweet, diabeticfriendly treat.

ingredients.name: sultanas (roasted)
ingredients.notes: roast at 180°C for 10 minutes until lightly browned

instructions: Rinse the fresh mint and pat dry; roughly chop and set aside.
Dice the cucumber and finely chop the red onion; place them in a large bowl.
Add the sliced strawberries and the roasted sultanas to the bowl.
Drizzle the olive oil over the mixture and sprinkle the sumac, salt, and pepper.
Pour the lemon juice and toss everything gently until well coated.
Fold in the chopped mint just before serving to keep the aroma bright.
Serve chilled or at room temperature; enjoy immediately for the best chewiness.
